message:
feat: copy OCI features into build context for multi-stage builds

- Add logic to copy OCI features from cache into build context before build
- Implement copyDir and copyFile helper functions for recursive directory copying
- Clean up temporary OCI cache directory after successful build
- Preserve file permissions when copying features
- Ensures Docker can access OCI features during multi-stage build

This completes the multi-stage build implementation by ensuring OCI features
outside the build context are properly copied in so they can be accessed
by the COPY commands in the generated Dockerfile.
